ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., country, state, city) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., disease, weather) */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target */,
  "target_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering alerts */,
  "target_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit associated with the target (foreign key to `units`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., time, distance) */,
  "unit_conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit (e.g., 1 week = 7 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "type_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the data type */,
  "type_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bins" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bin */,
  "bin_start_incl" REAL /* Start of the bin (inclusive) */,
  "bin_end_notincl" REAL /* End of the bin (not inclusive) */,
  "bin_label" TEXT /* Label for the bin (e.g., '40-41') */,
  "bin_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the bin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target being tracked */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin or range */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value of the data */,
  "value_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "value_source" TEXT /* Source of the value (e.g., 'CDC', 'WHO') */,
  "value_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the value (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date the weather data was collected */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather data (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "weather_value" REAL /* Actual value of the weather data */,
  "weather_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., 'NOAA') */,
  "weather_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the weather data (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_data" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the disease data was collected */,
  "disease_date" TEXT /* Date the disease data was collected */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease data (e.g., cases, deaths) */,
  "disease_value" INTEGER /* Actual value of the disease data */,
  "disease_source" TEXT /* Source of the disease data (e.g., 'CDC') */,
  "disease_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the disease data (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target being tracked */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin or range */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., 'desktop', 'mobile') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "model_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "model_last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the prediction is being made */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target being tracked */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin or range */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the target */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "prediction_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the alert is being generated */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target being tracked */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin or range */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message sent with the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., 'high', 'moderate') */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., 'active', 'resolved') */,
  "alert_response" TEXT /* Response action taken for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)
